Overrides.Override: Attacks have 5% chance to cause Bleeding
5% chance to Blind Enemies on Hit with Attacks

Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE Replica Badge of the Brotherhood Turquoise Amulet Unique ID: 10dceda1942bf04b40ef753cdf894dd8094b56b6b5686c90e7e3e3a6c5390036 Item Level: 86 LevelReq: 16 Implicits: 2 {crafted}Allocates Frenetic You can apply an additional Curse Your Maximum Endurance Charges is equal to your Maximum Frenzy Charges +1 to maximum Fortification per Endurance Charge 9% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate of Travel Skills per Frenzy Charge 25% chance to lose a Frenzy Charge when you use a Travel Skill 22% chance to lose an Endurance Charge when you gain Fortification Corrupted

Rarity: UNIQUE Replica Farrul's Fur Triumphant Lamellar Armour: 1079 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.7743 Evasion: 1356 EvasionBasePercentile: 0.778 Unique ID: e1558964ef7d41656d672d3c929df5ef05e448ffd920aaa9698c71c2da104126 Item Level: 83 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-R-G-G-G-R LevelReq: 69 Implicits: 2 +1% to all maximum Resistances 6% reduced Lightning Damage taken 112% increased Armour and Evasion +91 to maximum Life +2.00 seconds to Cat's Agility Duration Aspect of the Cat has no Reservation Gain up to your maximum number of Frenzy and Endurance Charges when you gain Cat's Agility You have Onslaught while you have Cat's Agility Corrupted
